text: Hi! Welcome to our booth. I'm Emma, from GreenField Seeds.
Hi Emma, nice to meet you. I'm Zilaudio, a farmer from Mato Grosso.
Nice to meet you too. I see your badge, Sorriso! What do you grow there?
I grow soybeans. Do you have a brochure about your seeds?
Of course, here you are. And which industry are you in, only farming?
Farming and law. Could I have your business card?
Sure. And could you give me yours too? You are a good contact for us.
Here you are. It was a pleasure. Let's stay in contact.
Hi, I'm Zilaudio. Nice to meet you.
Could I have your business card?
It was a pleasure. Let's stay in contact.

Good afternoon, and welcome to the second day of the International Agriculture Fair. A quick word before you start. The best business here does not happen in the big talks -- it happens at the booths, in small conversations, face to face. So walk around, say hello, and ask questions. Every exhibitor has a story and a product. Do not be shy. When you meet someone interesting, ask for a business card, and give them yours. That is how a contact becomes a deal. The networking lunch is at one o'clock, next to hall two. Coffee is free all day. Have a great day, and good conversations.

Hi Zilaudio, this is Emma from GreenField Seeds. It was very nice to meet you at our booth this morning. Thank you for the good conversation about your farm in Mato Grosso. I have your business card here, and I would like to talk more about our soybean seeds. Could we meet again tomorrow, before the fair closes? I am at booth number twenty, next to the main entrance, all day. If tomorrow is difficult, no problem -- just send me an email and we find another time. Thank you again, and enjoy the rest of the fair.
Could I have your business card?
Our booth is next to the entrance.
Hi, I'm Zilaudio. Nice to meet you.
It was a pleasure. Let's stay in contact.
